CONTENT.Club career: Onisiwo joined Austrian club SV Austria Salzburg in 2012. After two years in Mattersburg, he joined German side FSV Mainz 05 in January 2016. He scored his first goal for Mainz on 7 May 2016 in a 3-1 win against VfB Stuttgart. In his first full season in Mainz, Onisiwo played in the UEFA Europa League and finished as 3rd in group stage. He scored his first hat-trick for the club on 28 January 2023 in a 5–2 win against VfL Bochum.Onisiwo has a contract until 2026.

CONTENT.Career statistics: As of match played 21 April 2024Scores and results list Austria's goal tally first, score column indicates score after each Onisiwo goal.
CONTENT.International career: Onisiwo was born in Austria to a Nigerian father and Austrian mother. He made his debut for the senior Austria squad as a substitute, in a friendly against Switzerland in November 2015.

SUMMARY: Karim Onisiwo (born 17 March 1992) is an Austrian professional footballer who plays as a forward or right winger  for Bundesliga club Mainz 05 and the Austria national team.
